2603.20193.title: From Masks to Pixels and Meaning: A New Taxonomy, Benchmark, and Metrics for VLM Image Tampering
2603.20193.paper_summary: Existing tampering detection benchmarks largely rely on object masks, which severely misalign with the true edit signal: many pixels inside a mask are untouched or only trivially modified, while subtle yet consequential edits outside the mask are treated as natural. We reformulate VLM image tampering from coarse region labels to a pixel-grounded, meaning and language-aware task. First, we introduce a taxonomy spanning edit primitives (replace/remove/splice/inpaint/attribute/colorization, etc.) and their semantic class of tampered object, linking low-level changes to high-level understanding. Second, we release a new benchmark with per-pixel tamper maps and paired category supervision to evaluate detection and classification within a unified protocol. Third, we propose a training framework and evaluation metrics that quantify pixel-level correctness with localization to assess confidence or prediction on true edit intensity, and further measure tamper meaning understanding via semantics-aware classification and natural language descriptions for the predicted regions. We also re-evaluate the existing strong segmentation/localization baselines on recent strong tamper detectors and reveal substantial over- and under-scoring using mask-only metrics, and expose failure modes on micro-edits and off-mask changes. Our framework advances the field from masks to pixels, meanings and language descriptions, establishing a rigorous standard for tamper localization, semantic classification and description. Code and benchmark data are available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/PIXAR.
2603.20193.paper_summary_zh: 現有的篡改檢測基準主要依賴於物體遮罩，這與真實的編輯信號嚴重不對齊：遮罩內的許多像素未被觸及或僅被微小修改，而遮罩外的微妙但重要的編輯則被視為自然。我們將 VLM 圖像篡改重新定義為一個基於像素的、意義和語言意識的任務，從粗略的區域標籤開始。首先，我們介紹了一個涵蓋編輯原語（替換/移除/拼接/修補/屬性/上色等）及其篡改物體的語義類別的分類法，將低層次的變化與高層次的理解聯繫起來。其次，我們發布了一個新的基準，包含每個像素的篡改圖和配對的類別監督，以在統一的協議中評估檢測和分類。第三，我們提出了一個訓練框架和評估指標，量化像素級的正確性與定位，以評估對真實編輯強度的信心或預測，並進一步通過語義意識的分類和對預測區域的自然語言描述來測量篡改意義的理解。我們還重新評估了現有的強分割/定位基準，在最近的強篡改檢測器上揭示了使用僅基於遮罩的指標的顯著過度和不足評分，並暴露了微編輯和遮罩外變化的失效模式。我們的框架將該領域從遮罩推進到像素、意義和語言描述，為篡改定位、語義分類和描述建立了一個嚴格的標準。代碼和基準數據可在 https://github.com/VILA-Lab/PIXAR 獲得。
2603.20193.author: Xinyi Shang et.al.
2603.20193.authors: Xinyi Shang, Yi Tang, Jiacheng Cui, Ahmed Elhagry, Salwa K. Al Khatib, Sondos Mahmoud Bsharat, Jiacheng Liu, Xiaohan Zhao, Jing-Hao Xue, Hao Li, Salman Khan, Zhiqiang Shen
